item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct and supported the user's request to stop page-level patches and redesign the upstream after-sales rules entry. It proposed a unified rules/decision-entry structure, placement, information architecture, rollout order, and success criteria without firing a triage/meta-process or stopping for over-methodized analysis."}
